word: G3678 - ὀνάριον - onárion - on-ar'-ee-on - Young ass

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὀνάριον

- Transliteration: Onarion

- Phonetic: on-ar'-ee-on

- Definition:

1. a little ass

- Origin: from a presumed derivative of G3688

- TDNT entry: 09:43,7

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: Neuter of a presumed derivative of G3688; a little ass: - young ass.
